title: Unit test cases are failing because of exceljs
author: jitendernegi
body:
Unit test cases are failing because of exceljs and error is :

 Error: Zone.js has detected that ZoneAwarePromise `(window|global).Promise` has been overwritten.
        Most likely cause is that a Promise polyfill has been loaded after Zone.js (Polyfilling Promise api is not necessary when zone.js is loaded. If you must load one, do so before loading zone.js.)
            at Function.Zone.assertZonePatched (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone.js?:57:23)
            at new NgZone (webpack:///./node_modules/@angular/core/fesm5/core.js?:3993:14)
            at TestBed._initIfNeeded (webpack:///./node_modules/@angular/core/fesm5/testing.js?:1008:22)
            at TestBed.execute (webpack:///./node_modules/@angular/core/fesm5/testing.js?:1093:14)
            at UserContext.eval (webpack:///./node_modules/@angular/core/fesm5/testing.js?:1246:45)
            at ZoneDelegate.invoke (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone.js?:390:26)
            at ProxyZoneSpec.onInvoke (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone-testing.js?:288:39)
            at ZoneDelegate.invoke (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone.js?:389:52)
            at Zone.run (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone.js?:149:43)
            at runInTestZone (webpack:///./node_modules/zone.js/dist/zone-testing.js?:509:34)
HeadlessChrome 83.0.4103 (Windows 10.0.0): Executed 1 of 1602 (1 FAILED) (0 secs / 0.063 secs)
HeadlessChrome 83.0.4103 (Windows 10.0.0) LoaderService should be created FAILED

comments.author: jitendernegi
comments.body:
> Similar to #1008.
> This may help

Thanks for reply but the thread you mentioned, i have already gone through but no luck. Issue still persist. 
Also i have tried multiple ways as mentioned in different blogs but no luck till now.

comments.author: jitendernegi
comments.body: This issue is because of ExcelJS only, because i tried to run test cases in one of old branch before implementing Excel JS , on that branch, unit test cases are running successfully without any issue.
